const[cooldown,setCooldown]=useState(0);const[showCallInput,setShowCallInput]=useState(false);const[callMessage,setCallMessage]=useState("");const figure=GetSessionDataManager().figure;const username=GetSessionDataManager().userName;// ---- Derived helpers ----

useEffect(()=>{if(xp>lastXp){setXpGained(xp-lastXp);const t=setTimeout(()=>setXpGained(null),1500);return()=>clearTimeout(t);}setLastXp(xp);},[xp,lastXp]);// ---- Client -> Server actions (no optimistic flips) ----

};const togglePassive=()=>{SendMessageComposer(new PassiveModeComposer(!isPassive));// Will flip when server confirms via event
};// ---- Server -> Client: hook message events & window events ----
useEffect(()=>{// 1) Nitro message event for work status
const workEvt=new UpdateWorkStatusEvent(parser=>{try{const serverIsWorking=parser.isWorking;// parser property name as defined in your event
setIsWorking(!!serverIsWorking);// also broadcast so other widgets can react if needed
window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent("work_status_update",{detail:{isWorking:!!serverIsWorking}}));}catch{/* ignore */}});Nitro.instance.communication.registerMessageEvent(workEvt);// 2) Optional: custom window events (if your Java code emits them elsewhere)
const onWorkCustom=e=>{const detail=e.detail;if(typeof(detail===null||detail===void 0?void 0:detail.isWorking)==="boolean")setIsWorking(detail.isWorking);};const onPassiveCustom=e=>{const detail=e.detail;if(typeof(detail===null||detail===void 0?void 0:detail.isPassive)==="boolean")setIsPassive(detail.isPassive);};window.addEventListener("work_status_update",onWorkCustom);window.addEventListener("passive_mode_update",onPassiveCustom);return()=>{Nitro.instance.communication.removeMessageEvent(workEvt);window.removeEventListener("work_status_update",onWorkCustom);window.removeEventListener("passive_mode_update",onPassiveCustom);};},[]);// ---- Stats bundle from server (your existing custom event) ----
useEffect(()=>{const handleStatsUpdate=event=>{const stats=event.detail;if(!stats)return;setHealth(stats.health);setMaxHealth(stats.maxHealth);setEnergy(stats.energy);setMaxEnergy(stats.maxEnergy);setHunger(stats.hunger);setMaxHunger(stats.maxHunger);setAggression(stats.aggression);setXp(stats.xp);setMaxXP(stats.maxXP);setStrength(stats.strength);setLevel(stats.level);setPoints(stats.points);setDefense(stats.defense);setStaminaLevel(stats.stamina);setHungerLevel(stats.hunger_level);setGatheringLevel(stats.gathering);setPunchesThrown(stats.punches_thrown);setPunchesLanded(stats.punches_landed);setDamageInflicted(stats.damage_inflicted);setDamageReceived(stats.damage_received);setShiftsWorked(stats.shifts_worked);setKills(stats.kills);setDeaths(stats.deaths);setArrests(stats.arrests);setHealthLevel(stats.healthlevel);// Server truth for these two:
